title: chrysanthemum dabieshanense
intro: Chrysanthemum dabieshanense, also known as Dabieshan chrysanthemum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to the Dabieshan Mountains in China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum dabieshanense include reducing fever, alleviating cough and sore throat, and improving cardiovascular health. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or infusion, or used topically in creams and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
